Based on my visual inspection of the molecule `geomconf_5693.xyz`, I can identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 50 (Carbon).

**Neighbor atoms of C:50:**
- **Atom 49 (C)** - adjacent carbon in the ring below
- **Atom 51 (C)** - adjacent carbon in the ring above  
- **Atom 57 (H)** - hydrogen atom attached to the right side

**geomconf_index:** geomconf_5693

The geometry shows that C:50 is part of an aromatic ring system and has three covalent bonds: two to neighboring carbon atoms (49 and 51) and one to a hydrogen atom (57).

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 50 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
